latin: Leifus Ericii filius trans mare ignotum navigavit. terram novam invenit ubi vites crescebant. eam Vinlandiam appellavit. Norsemanni gaudebant, sed indigenae non tam amicales erant.

questions.prompt: Why was the land called Vinland?
How did the natives react to the Vikings?

translation: Leif, son of Eric, sailed across the unknown sea. He found a new land where grapevines grew. He called it Vinland. The Norsemen rejoiced, but the natives were not so friendly.
